description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs all jobs in the default test stage. Add four Debian test jobs named debian-testing, debian7, debian8, and debian9, using the images debian:testing, debian:wheezy, debian:jessie, and debian:stretch respectively, each executing ./test.sh with the matching debserver name; mark debian-testing with allow_failure:true. Add four shellcheck jobs named shellcheck-debserver-testing, shellcheck-debserver7, shellcheck-debserver8, and shellcheck-debserver9, each using the rdeavila/docker-shellcheck:latest image and running shellcheck --version then shellcheck -x -e SC2154 -e SC2086 -s bash on the corresponding debserver script. No caches, artifacts, services, or variables are defined. The pipeline should run these jobs on any branch.
